expectations.text: The review identifies at least 1 finding (code is not perfect)
expectations.evidence: 9 findings across Critical, Moderate, and Minor categories

expectations.text: The review mentions the time.sleep in tests as a potential concern
expectations.evidence: Issue #3: time.sleep() in tests makes the suite slow and flaky

expectations.text: Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
expectations.evidence: Grouped under Critical Issues, Moderate Issues, Minor Issues headings

expectations.text: Each finding includes a file location reference
expectations.evidence: Most findings include file and line references

expectations.text: The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
expectations.evidence: Uses numbered headings (### 1. _evict_expired...) with severity section headers, not F{N} format

expectations.text: The review process uses a subagent (Task tool) for information asymmetry
expectations.evidence: No subagent expected for baseline (without_skill) run
